name: anisoptera thurifera
mechanism: volatile terpenes | resins modulate inflammation and microbial load
safetyNotes: Very limited data,possible allergenic or irritant resin effects similar to Dipterocarpaceae relatives,Low,resin sometimes inhaled or used externally.

description: Dipterocarpaceae tree native to Southeast Asia; known for aromatic resin.
